Uses of Class
org.bukkit.util.Transformation

Packages that use Transformation
Package
Description
org.bukkit.entity
Interfaces for non-voxel objects that can exist in a world, including all players, monsters, projectiles, etc.

    Method
    Description
    Transformation
    Display.getTransformation()
    Gets the transformation applied to this display.

    Display.setTransformation(Transformation transformation)
    Sets the transformation applied to this display
